overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a red jacket descending a wooden staircase in a dimly lit rustic interior. The character explores an old house with warm lighting from wall sconces, antique furniture, and framed portraits on the walls.

agents.ego_description: carefully walking down the wooden stairs, holding the railing

entered.detail: heavy red curtain hanging beside the staircase
steep wooden stairs with worn steps and dark railing
pile of wooden crates and boxes stacked against the wall
ornate wall-mounted candle holder with lit candles

segments.scene_description: The character descends a narrow wooden staircase in a dimly lit interior space. A heavy red velvet curtain hangs to the left while stacked wooden crates line the wall, and warm light emanates from an ornate wrought iron wall sconce.

events.description: reaches bottom of stairs and enters furnished room with sofa and desk

agents.ego_description: walking through the furnished room toward the hallway exit

entered.detail: vintage upholstered sofa with wooden frame and decorative pillows
wooden writing desk with lit oil lamp and scattered papers
circular woven area rug covering the wooden floor
tall wooden bookshelf filled with books against the far wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a furnished living area at the bottom of the stairs featuring an antique sofa, wooden desk with a lit lamp, and a round woven rug. The warm lighting continues as the character moves from the stairwell into the open room.

events.description: moves from open living area into narrow hallway

agents.ego_description: walking along the hallway toward a closed wooden door

entered.detail: two framed vintage portraits hanging on the wall
closed wooden door with metal handle at end of hallway

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the living area into a narrow hallway lined with framed portraits on the left wall. The character approaches a closed wooden panel door at the end of the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped stairwell into a furnished living space and finally down a narrow, portrait-lined corridor. It begins with the character descending a narrow wooden staircase past a heavy red velvet curtain and stacked crates, illuminated by the warm glow of a wrought iron wall sconce. As the character reaches the bottom, the space opens into a furnished living area featuring an antique sofa, a wooden desk with a lit lamp, and a round woven rug. The scene then shifts from the open room into a confined hallway where framed portraits line the left wall, guiding the movement forward. Finally, the camera follows the character as they approach a closed wooden panel door at the end of the corridor.
